name: KLine_SetUARTParameter
title: KLine_SetUARTParameter
syntax: long KLine_SetUARTParameter(dword dataBits, dword parity, dword stopBits);
description: Configures the way bytes are sent on K-Line, by setting the parameters the UART (universal asynchronous receiver/transmitter) uses.

parameters.name: dataBits
parameters.description: Number of bits a byte consists of.Possible values: 7, 8, 9.Note: 7 bits in a byte will not allow standard K-Line communication.

example.code:
KLine_CreateECURepresentation( gMsgChannel);
KLine_SetUARTParameter( 9, 1, 2); // 9 data bytes, odd parity, 2 stop bits => 13 bit/byte (including start bit)
